_comment: Example Claude Code hooks for navigator-watch. Merge the `hooks` block into your settings file (~/.claude/settings.json for all projects, or .claude/settings.json in the learning project). Replace ABSOLUTE_PATH with the absolute path to this tool directory, e.g. /Users/you/workspace/agent-tools/tools/navigator-watch. Hook commands must use absolute paths; Claude Code does not resolve them relative to the project.
